criteriaResults.evidence: Route configured in App.tsx line 26, E2E test passed, page loads with Tasks heading

criteriaResults.criterion: Three columns displayed: To Do, In Progress, Done
criteriaResults.evidence: KanbanBoard.tsx defines 3 columns, E2E test verified all columns visible with correct labels

criteriaResults.criterion: Column headers show column name and task count badge
criteriaResults.evidence: KanbanColumn.tsx renders header with Badge showing count, E2E verified counts: 7, 6, 4

criteriaResults.criterion: Columns are equal width on desktop (>1024px)
criteriaResults.evidence: Grid uses lg:grid-cols-3 for equal width at 1024px+, E2E verified grid classes
Default grid-cols-1 stacks columns, switches to 3 cols at lg breakpoint only

criteriaResults.criterion: Each column has scrollable content area for many tasks
criteriaResults.evidence: KanbanColumn uses flex-1 overflow-y-auto with maxHeight calc(100vh - 220px)

criteriaResults.criterion: Empty columns show No tasks placeholder text
criteriaResults.evidence: KanbanColumn conditionally renders 'No tasks' when tasks.length === 0

criteriaResults.criterion: Columns have subtle background color differentiation
criteriaResults.evidence: columnStyles object defines distinct bg colors: gray-50, blue-50/50, green-50/50

criteriaResults.criterion: Task cards show: title, assignee avatar, priority badge, due date
criteriaResults.evidence: TaskCard.tsx renders all 4 elements, E2E test verified presence
priorityConfig maps low→gray, medium→yellow, high→red, E2E verified variants

criteriaResults.criterion: Assignee shown as small circular avatar with tooltip for name
criteriaResults.evidence: Avatar size='sm' with title={assignee.name} tooltip, E2E verified avatar visible

criteriaResults.criterion: Due date formatted as short date (e.g., Jan 28)
criteriaResults.evidence: formatShortDate uses toLocaleDateString with month: 'short', day: 'numeric'

criteriaResults.criterion: Overdue tasks show due date in red text
criteriaResults.evidence: isOverdue function checks dates, applies text-red-600, E2E verified red class

criteriaResults.criterion: Cards have white (light) / gray-800 (dark) background with shadow
criteriaResults.evidence: TaskCard uses bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 shadow-sm classes

criteriaResults.criterion: Cards have hover state with elevated shadow
criteriaResults.evidence: hover:shadow-md transition-shadow classes, E2E verified hover classes

criteriaResults.criterion: Tasks correctly sorted into columns based on status from DataContext
criteriaResults.evidence: tasksByStatus useMemo groups by task.status, E2E verified correct counts per column

e2eResults.regressionNote: 8 failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts are pre-existing test config issues (wrong port 5174 vs 5173), not regressions from Task 12

handoff.handoffNotes: Task 12 fully validated and passing. All 16 acceptance criteria verified through E2E tests and code inspection. Kanban board layout complete with 3 columns, task cards display all required metadata (title, assignee, priority, due date), responsive design works across breakpoints, and empty states handled. 10 new E2E tests all passing. No regressions introduced - 8 prior test failures are pre-existing config issues unrelated to Task 12. Implementation quality excellent with proper TypeScript types, accessibility, dark mode support, and performance optimizations.
